title: pilosella × cinerea subsp. langii
intro: Pilosella × cinerea subsp. langii, also known as the hybrid of Pilosella cinerea and Pilosella langii, is a rare, sterile plant species that is a natural hybrid of two different plants. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella × cinerea subsp. langii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared through various herbal methods, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
